expect: At least 2 of the top 10 dispatch ranks change, and operations-research rises by >=2 positions after multiplicative human-benefit weighting.
method: Replace additive soul correction in dispatch_scoring.py with multiplicative weighting, then compare pre-change HEAD scoring against current scoring on the same repo state. Verify with a targeted unittest and rerun enforcement_router.py.
actual: Expectation exceeded. 7 of the top 10 dispatch ranks changed, and operations-research rose from rank 11 to rank 5 after multiplicative human-benefit weighting. enforcement_router.py now counts L-1485 as structurally wired, raising structural prescriptions from 111 to 112 and enforcement rate from 29.2% to 29.5%.
diff: Expected a modest reordering (>=2 top-10 changes, operations-research +>=2 ranks). Got a stronger correction: +6 ranks for operations-research and 7 top-10 changes. Multiplicative weighting materially changed dispatch order instead of adding flat noise.
